shared.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, mixing letters, digits and symbols.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your store dashboard.

signup.subtitle: Start free — no credit card required.
signup.agreePrefix: By creating an account you agree to our

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.success: If an account exists for that email, we've sent reset instructions.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.tokenHint: Paste the token from your reset/invite link.
reset.success: Your password has been set. You can now sign in.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.success: Your email is verified. You're all set!
verify.manualIntro: Need a new verification link? Enter your email and we'll resend it.
verify.resent: If that account exists and is unverified, a new link is on its way.

adminLogin.title: Admin sign in
adminLogin.subtitle: Restricted to platform administrators.
adminLogin.notAdmin: This account is not a platform administrator.
